testCases.title: Source-scoped aliases map the same source term to distinct canonical terms
testCases.expectedBehavior: CRM, billing, and support source terms named customer map deterministically to their approved canonical terms without LLM promotion.

testCases.title: Overloaded source terms produce an unresolved blocking conflict
testCases.expectedBehavior: An overloaded customer alias with multiple candidate canonical terms produces an open blocking SemanticConflict before mutation or promotion.

testCases.title: Read-only or docs-only work records explicit non-applicable mappings
testCases.expectedBehavior: Non-applicable semantic work produces non_applicable mappings with explicit evidence refs and zero unresolved blocking conflicts.
